name: GLSLPasta.Lighting

values.name: fragmentNoNormal
values.comment: same as the normal mapping shader, but without deforming normals.

values.name: fragmentReflection
values.comment:
This shader uses Spherical Environment Mapping (SEM).
Here are some relevant links:

  - [very cool demo](https://www.clicktorelease.com/code/spherical-normal-mapping/#)
  - <https://www.clicktorelease.com/blog/creating-spherical-environment-mapping-shader>
  - <http://www.ozone3d.net/tutorials/glsl_texturing_p04.php>

values.name: fragmentSimple
values.comment: same as above, but without any textures.

values.name: fragment_interpolatedNormal
values.comment: Provides pixelNormal by interpolating vertex normals

values.name: fragment_phong
values.comment:
Provides gl_FragColor, according to the Phong shading model

  - <https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Phong_reflection_model>

values.name: fragment_textureDiffuse
values.comment: Provides diffuseColor given by an input diffuse texture

values.name: fragment_textureNormal
values.comment: Provides pixelNormal given by an input normal texture

values.name: vertexNoNormal
values.comment: same as the normal mapping shader, but without deforming normals.

values.name: vertexNoTangent
values.comment: same as the normal mapping shader, but without deforming normals.

values.name: vertexReflection
values.comment:
This shader uses Spherical Environment Mapping (SEM).
Here are some relevant links:

  - [very cool demo](https://www.clicktorelease.com/code/spherical-normal-mapping/#)
  - <https://www.clicktorelease.com/blog/creating-spherical-environment-mapping-shader>
  - <http://www.ozone3d.net/tutorials/glsl_texturing_p04.php>

values.name: vertexSimple
values.comment: same as above, but without any textures.

values.name: vertex_SphericalEnvironmentMapping
values.comment:
This shader uses Spherical Environment Mapping (SEM).
Here are some relevant links:

  - [very cool demo](https://www.clicktorelease.com/code/spherical-normal-mapping/#)
  - <https://www.clicktorelease.com/blog/creating-spherical-environment-mapping-shader>
  - <http://www.ozone3d.net/tutorials/glsl_texturing_p04.php>

Generates vNormal

values.name: vertex_clipPosition
values.comment: Forward the position in clip space (ie. gl_Position) to the fragment shader, as clipPosition

values.name: vertex_vTexCoord
values.comment: Forward the texture coordinate to the fragment shader, as vTexCoord

values.name: combine
values.comment:
Combine Components into the code for a Shader, that can be passed to WebGL.unsafeShader.
Errors are logged to the Javascript console.

values.name: combineUsingTemplate
values.comment:
Combine Components into the code for a Shader, that can be passed to WebGL.unsafeShader.
Errors are logged to the Javascript console.

The template is specified as a string containing placeholders `__PASTA_GLOBALS__`,
`__PASTA_FUNCTIONS__` and `__PASTA_SPLICES__`. For a concrete example, see the definition
of `defaultTemplate`.

values.name: defaultTemplate
values.comment: The default template used by combine

name: GLSLPasta.Types

unions.name: Error
cases: { what : String, parentComponentId : ComponentId, newComponentId : ComponentId, oldComponentIds : List ComponentId, newGlobal : Global, oldGlobal : Global }
{ parentComponentId : ComponentId, componentId : ComponentId, requirement : Feature }

aliases.name: Component
aliases.type: { id : ComponentId, dependencies : Dependencies, provides : List Feature, requires : List Feature, globals : List Global, functions : List Function, splices : List Splice }

aliases.name: ComponentId
aliases.comment:
An identifier for a Component
Each Component is labelled with a ComponentId for use in error messages.

aliases.name: Feature
aliases.comment:
An abstract feature provided by a Component, often the name of a
variable.

For example, a shader that initially sets gl_FragColor might specify

    provides =
        [ "gl_FragColor" ]

and another shader that modifies gl_FragColor might specify

    requires =
        [ "gl_FragColor" ]

aliases.name: Template
aliases.type: { id : ComponentId, globals : List Global, template : String }

aliases.name: Value
aliases.comment: The value of a global constant
